name: Spice Hot Pads
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the cinnamon sticks and cloves.
2. Mix with the uncooked rice.
3. Place in a cloth bag, approximately 7 inches by 7 inches.
4. Sew up the open end.
Use as a hot pad; the scent will emanate when a hot dish is placed on the mat. You can substitute herbs (such as herbal tea) for the spices. For added elegance, carefully sew seams across the pad to create a criss-cross or chessboard pattern, which makes the pad less floppy and easier to use.
